meta.title: Irwin Stelzer on President Obama's Budget Proposal
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Irwin Stelzer discusses President Obama's recently completed budget proposal. Will Congress look at the budget more favorably due to 2010 being an election year? Is it wise for the budget to count on 3% economic growth?
